message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Caller
participant Actor as CalledDynamase
participant Interface as ServeurDynamase
participant Interface as Asterisk

Actor Caller
Actor CalledDynamase
Interface ServeurDynamase
Interface Asterisk

Caller -> ServeurDynamase: clickButton
ServeurDynamase --> ServeurDynamase: Verification

ServeurDynamase --> Asterisk: Create conference room
Asterisk --> ServeurDynamase: Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number

ServeurDynamase --> Caller: Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number
Asterisk --> CalledDynamase: Ask_to_call_the_trunk_number_with_information_of_the_caller

Caller -> Asterisk: Call_With_Trunk_Number
Asterisk --> CalledDynamase: Call_With_Trunk_Number

Asterisk --> ServeurDynamase: When the communication is ending
ServeurDynamase --> Asterisk: communication ending

@enduml
